name: giant-cipher-solver
description: CLI to search The Giant (BO3) ciphertext: heuristics + brute-force + English checks

scripts.solve: npm run build && cross-env GIANT_EXTENDED_KEYWORDS=200 GIANT_CLASSICAL_KEYS=120 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_KEYS=96 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_MAX=150 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 GIANT_LAYER_XORREP=220 GIANT_LAYER_RC4=220 GIANT_LAYER_XOR256_MAXBUFS=80 node dist/index.js
scripts.solve:quick: npm run build && cross-env GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=2 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=2 GIANT_MAX_MS=180000 GIANT_EXTENDED_KEYWORDS=72 GIANT_CLASSICAL_KEYS=40 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_KEYS=20 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_MAX=48 GIANT_NESTED_B64=8 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=160 GIANT_LAYER_XORREP=72 GIANT_LAYER_RC4=72 GIANT_LAYER_XOR256_MAXBUFS=40 node dist/index.js
scripts.solve:full: npm run build && cross-env GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=4 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=4 GIANT_MAX_MS=600000 GIANT_EXTENDED_KEYWORDS=200 GIANT_CLASSICAL_KEYS=120 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_KEYS=96 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_MAX=150 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 GIANT_LAYER_XORREP=220 GIANT_LAYER_RC4=220 GIANT_LAYER_XOR256_MAXBUFS=80 node dist/index.js
scripts.solve:30m: npm run build && cross-env GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=5 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=5 GIANT_MAX_MS=1800000 GIANT_PROGRESS_EVERY=400000 GIANT_EXTENDED_KEYWORDS=200 GIANT_CLASSICAL_KEYS=120 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_KEYS=96 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_MAX=150 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 GIANT_LAYER_XORREP=220 GIANT_LAYER_RC4=220 GIANT_LAYER_XOR256_MAXBUFS=80 node dist/index.js
scripts.solve:1h: npm run build && cross-env GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=5 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=5 GIANT_MAX_MS=3600000 GIANT_PROGRESS_EVERY=400000 GIANT_EXTENDED_KEYWORDS=200 GIANT_CLASSICAL_KEYS=120 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_KEYS=96 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_MAX=150 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 GIANT_LAYER_XORREP=220 GIANT_LAYER_RC4=220 GIANT_LAYER_XOR256_MAXBUFS=80 node dist/index.js
scripts.solve:6h: npm run build && cross-env GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=5 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=5 GIANT_MAX_MS=21600000 GIANT_PROGRESS_EVERY=500000 GIANT_EXTENDED_KEYWORDS=200 GIANT_CLASSICAL_KEYS=120 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_KEYS=96 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_MAX=150 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 GIANT_LAYER_XORREP=220 GIANT_LAYER_RC4=220 GIANT_LAYER_XOR256_MAXBUFS=80 node dist/index.js
scripts.solve:24h: npm run build && cross-env GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=5 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=5 GIANT_MAX_MS=86400000 GIANT_PROGRESS_EVERY=500000 GIANT_EXTENDED_KEYWORDS=200 GIANT_CLASSICAL_KEYS=120 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_KEYS=96 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_MAX=150 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 GIANT_LAYER_XORREP=220 GIANT_LAYER_RC4=220 GIANT_LAYER_XOR256_MAXBUFS=80 node dist/index.js
scripts.solve:unlimited: npm run build && cross-env GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=5 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=5 GIANT_MAX_MS=0 GIANT_PROGRESS_EVERY=750000 GIANT_EXTENDED_KEYWORDS=200 GIANT_CLASSICAL_KEYS=120 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_KEYS=96 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_MAX=150 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 GIANT_LAYER_XORREP=220 GIANT_LAYER_RC4=220 GIANT_LAYER_XOR256_MAXBUFS=80 node dist/index.js
scripts.dump: npm run build && cross-env GIANT_EXTENDED_KEYWORDS=200 GIANT_CLASSICAL_KEYS=120 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_KEYS=96 GIANT_BLOCK_CIPHER_MAX=150 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 node dist/index.js --dump-all
